creator: edward.kovarski@groupkae.com
text: Hi, we would like to be added to the commercial vendors for the North American region. We are located in Toronto, Canada and provide many solutions based on FreeBSD technology, such as consolidated file servers, web servers, etc. I've included the html blurb under "fix to the problem if known". Do let me know if there is anything else that is required from us to be listed. Thanks! Regards, Edward Kovarski Fix: Group Kae is a not like any technology services company you may have worked with before. We constantly challenge the status quo to anticipate future needs and deliver innovative technology solutions to our clients. Our relationship with clients is a partnership - we bring our experience, best practices and tools to apply to clients unique requirements. We are based in Toronto, Canada and may be contacted via email or telephone at +1 (647) 723-6000.
